name: Cotellette Alla Milanese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, beat the eggs and add salt and pepper.
2. Dip cutlets first into beaten eggs, then into bread crumbs to coat well.
3. Heat oil 1 inch deep to 360°F in a large skillet.
4. Fry cutlets on both sides until golden brown.
5. Drain on paper towels.
6. Garnish with lemon and parsley.
7. Serve with steamed peas and sauteed whole mushrooms.
Serves 6.
